Row.Text: The Shrine Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Shrine. This gives your city +10 [ICON_CULTURE] Culture, +10 [ICON_PEACE] Faith, +20% [ICON_CULTURE] Culture, +5 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] Happiness, and +25% Border Growth Rate.

The Shrine Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Shrine. This gives your city +10 [ICON_CULTURE] Culture, +10 [ICON_PEACE] Faith, +20% [ICON_CULTURE] Culture, +5 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] Happiness, and +25% Border Growth Rate.

The Shrine Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Shrine. This gives your city +10 [ICON_CULTURE] Culture, +10 [ICON_PEACE] Faith, +20% [ICON_CULTURE] Culture, +5 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] Happiness, and +25% Border Growth Rate.
